MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Brian R. Davis, Esq. of ROPERS MAJESKI 543-4800, for defendant Pensco Pension Services Inc. moving for adjudication
Richard A. Kutche, Esq., 408/295-0474, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT PENSCO PENSION SERVICES INC.'s Motion For Adjudication -- 2nd c/a (Breach of Fiduciary Duty) and 5th c/a (Constructive Fraud) - Denied. Triable issue of fact exists regarding existence of and breach of fiduciary duty. 4th c/a (Fraud & Deceit) and Punitive Damages - Denied. Triable issue of fact existing regarding intent to induce to rely on misrepresentation. 6th c/a violation of Calif. Securities Laws, Corp. 25401 - Treated as Judgment on Pleadings and Granted.
Plaintiff to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (DAG/301/CW) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
